title: 'podman image list' more strict with podman-4.x
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

Filters with `podman image list` seem to have changed:

```
$ sudo podman --version
podman version 3.4.4

$ sudo podman image list gentoo
REPOSITORY               TAG                      IMAGE ID      CREATED     SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build   latest                   8d22f7845681  7 days ago  1.01 GB
localhost/gentoo-env     latest                   e234871ee530  8 days ago  21.3 kB
docker.io/gentoo/stage3  amd64-nomultilib-openrc  4bf5431c8b92  9 days ago  1 GB
```

```
$ sudo podman --version
podman version 4.0.0-rc3

$ sudo podman image list gentoo
REPOSITORY  TAG         IMAGE ID    CREATED     SIZE

$ sudo podman image list | grep gentoo
localhost/gentoo-build   latest                   8d22f7845681  7 days ago  1.01 GB
localhost/gentoo-env     latest                   e234871ee530  8 days ago  21.3 kB
docker.io/gentoo/stage3  amd64-nomultilib-openrc  4bf5431c8b92  9 days ago  1 GB

$ sudo podman image list gentoo-env
REPOSITORY            TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED     SIZE
localhost/gentoo-env  latest      e234871ee530  8 days ago  21.3 kB
```

I just wanted to check whether this was an intentional change - I really liked the fact that, up until now, `podman image list` was effectively a global match rather than an exact match.

If this is the desired way forwards (… for docker compatibility?) then is there an option/filter which can be supplied to restore the previous behaviour?

(It was also previously possible to do, for example, `podman image list localhost` to filter by repo - but I think this can be done with `podman image list --filter reference=localhost/*`, so perhaps the previous behaviour is equivalent to `podman image list --filter reference=*<search_term>*`)

N.B. The `podman-image-list` manpage states:

> reference=
>            Filter by image name, specified as regular expressions.

… but this seems incorrect - using a filter of `^localhost/.*`, `^localhost/` or `localhost/.*` above produces no matches, so the reference appears to be a wildcard match rather than regular-expression?

**Describe the results you received:**

`podman image list` parameters are treated as strict matches.

**Describe the results you expected:**

`podman image list` parameters were treated as fuzzy.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.0.0-rc3
API Version:  4.0.0-rc3
Go Version:   go1.17.5
Git Commit:   9b441c0dda57a79dc96eba90be6e2d1ece4b4905
Built:        Tue Feb  1 12:45:42 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

comments.body: @vrothberg  Do you think this was intentional or just a side effect of other changes?

Thanks for reaching out, @srcshelton.

That is a known/desired result of fixing https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11905.  We can now properly use `*` to match anything that comes *after*.  Note that it'll only match names, not repositories. To match repositories, we need to specify the registry.  It won't match `docker.io/gentoo/stage3` as previously; note that the new behavior is Docker compatible which we ultimately aimed for.

```
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images
REPOSITORY              TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build  latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago   1.46 MB
localhost/gentoo-env    latest      c059bfaa849c  2 months ago  5.87 MB
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images gentoo
REPOSITORY  TAG         IMAGE ID    CREATED     SIZE
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images gentoo*
REPOSITORY              TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build  latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago   1.46 MB
localhost/gentoo-env    latest      c059bfaa849c  2 months ago  5.87 MB
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images gentoo-build
REPOSITORY              TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED      SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build  latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago  1.46 MB
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images localhost/*
REPOSITORY              TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED       SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build  latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago   1.46 MB
localhost/gentoo-env    latest      c059bfaa849c  2 months ago  5.87 MB
```
Of course just piping to grep also works quite well.

EDIT: let me update the examples above. `gentoo-build` should only match this very image but both are listed below because the tags refer to the same image.
```
podman (main) $ ./bin/podman images gentoo-build
REPOSITORY              TAG         IMAGE ID      CREATED      SIZE
localhost/gentoo-build  latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago  1.46 MB
localhost/gentoo-env    latest      beae173ccac6  4 weeks ago  1.46 MB
```
